items.label: Installation
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games

Lightweight browser game engine powered by a CDN.

## Install

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"></script>
```

or

```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"
```

```js
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: Initialization
items.content:
## init(options?)

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({
  mode: "all",
  search: "alien",
  sort: "name"
})
```

Effect:
- Loads game database
- Detects device
- Applies search and sorting

Example result (ZYNQ.games.list):
```js
[
  {
    name: "Alien Hominid",
    alias: "alien-hominid",
    category: "shooter",
    isSupported: true
  }
]
```

items.label: Game Model
items.content:
## Game Object

Example:
```js
{
  name: "Alien Hominid",
  alias: "alien-hominid",
  url: "arcade/alien-hominid",
  thumb: "https://cdn/.../alien-hominid.webp",
  category: "shooter",
  devices: [2,3],
  isSupported: true,
  isFavorite: false
}
```

items.label: View
items.content:
## View State

### list
```js
ZYNQ.games.list
```

Example:
```js
[{ name: "Run 3" }, { name: "Slope" }]
```

### total
```js
ZYNQ.games.total
```

Example:
```js
120
```

### filteredCount
```js
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount
```

Example:
```js
3
```

items.label: Methods
items.content:
## Core

### search(query)
```js
ZYNQ.games.search("alien")
```

Result:
```js
[{ name: "Alien Hominid" }]
```

---

### getByAlias(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("alien-hominid")
```

Returns:
```js
{ name: "Alien Hominid", alias: "alien-hominid" }
```

---

### getByCategory(category)
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("shooter")
```

Result:
```js
[{ name: "Alien Hominid" }, { name: "Metal Slug" }]
```

---

### reset()
```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```

Result:
```js
[/* full dataset restored */]
```

---

## Filtering

### filterSupported()
```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

Result:
```js
[{ name: "Run 3", isSupported: true }]
```

---

### filterFavorites()
```js
ZYNQ.games.filterFavorites()
```

Result:
```js
[{ name: "Alien Hominid", isFavorite: true }]
```

---

## Sorting

### sortBy(field)
```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

Result:
```js
[
  { name: "Alien Hominid" },
  { name: "Run 3" }
]
```

---

### sortByPopularity()
```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

Result:
```js
[
  { name: "Alien Hominid", playCount: 12000 },
  { name: "Run 3", playCount: 9000 }
]
```

---

### shuffle()
```js
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

Result:
```js
[
  { name: "Slope" },
  { name: "Run 3" },
  { name: "Alien Hominid" }
]
```

---

## Random

### random(limit)
```js
ZYNQ.games.random(2)
```

Result:
```js
[
  { name: "Run 3" },
  { name: "Slope" }
]
```

---

### getRandomOne()
```js
ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

Returns:
```js
{ name: "Alien Hominid" }
```

---

## Favorites

### toggleFavorite(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

Effect:
```js
localStorage.ZYNQ_favs = ["alien-hominid"]
```

Game state:
```js
{ alias: "alien-hominid", isFavorite: true }
```

---

### isFavorite(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

Returns:
```js
true
```

---

## History

### addToHistory(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.addToHistory("alien-hominid")
```

Effect:
```js
["alien-hominid", "run-3"]
```

---

### getHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
```

Returns:
```js
[
  { name: "Alien Hominid" },
  { name: "Run 3" }
]
```

---

### clearHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.clearHistory()
```

Result:
```js
[]
```
